title: post api mockbook folders create folder with authorization
description: Test creating a new exam folder using POST /api/mockbook/folders with valid Authorization header. Verify response status 201 and returned folder object contains id, name, path, and orgId.

title: get api mockbook folders list all folders
description: Test retrieving all exam folders using GET /api/mockbook/folders without authorization. Verify response status 200 and response contains an array of folders including public/global and org folders.

title: post api mockbook categories create test series with valid folderid
description: Test creating a new test series using POST /api/mockbook/categories with valid Authorization and body containing name, folderId, and examType. Verify response status 201 and returned category object.

title: post api mockbook categories create test series with invalid folderid
description: Test creating a new test series using POST /api/mockbook/categories with valid Authorization but folderId that does not exist. Verify response status 404 with validation error message.

title: get api super admin mockbook orgid tests list tests with superadmin authorization
description: Test listing mock tests for an organization using GET /api/super-admin/mockbook/:orgId/tests with SuperAdmin JWT. Verify response status 200 and returned array of mock tests for the specified organization.

title: post api super admin mockbook orgid tests create test with superadmin authorization
description: Test creating a mock test for an organization using POST /api/super-admin/mockbook/:orgId/tests with SuperAdmin JWT and valid body. Verify response status 201 and returned mock test object containing testId, orgId, and status.

title: get api super admin organizations id get organization details with superadmin authorization
description: Test retrieving organization details using GET /api/super-admin/organizations/:id with SuperAdmin JWT. Verify response status 200 and returned organization details including id, name, plan, and featureFlags.

title: get api super admin mockbook orgid tests forbidden for non superadmin
description: Test accessing GET /api/super-admin/mockbook/:orgId/tests with OrgStaff JWT (non-SuperAdmin). Verify response status 403 Forbidden.

title: post api super admin mockbook invalid org tests not found
description: Test creating a mock test for an invalid organization using POST /api/super-admin/mockbook/invalid-org/tests with SuperAdmin JWT. Verify response status 404 Not Found with error message.
